name: The White House
subject: The ‘unbreakable’ friendship of America and France
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b6dc8c0b6fdf3c9d5673b72f3845bdc4e863f1441f41674d29eb2ad63b84891f2c7bad1fa1a67526f6310139fa0fb60f1fdc99740a5900a3

The White House - April 24, 2018

Driving the Day

This morning at 9 a.m. ET, President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump host the official State Welcome Ceremony for French President Emmanuel Macron and Mrs. Brigitte Macron on the South Lawn. It is the first State Visit of the Trump Presidency.
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b6dc8c0b6fdf3c9d72a2493aaa720e4fe689c471b026ac2e631d350ac86bebd41fc4ca8a83c68d3338d7bb001fa81e1a8e1baf9f9adeae93
Watch live.

The ‘unbreakable’ friendship of America and France

America’s relationship with France predates our country’s founding. When American colonists fought for independence, France supported them with military and economic aid. From the days of Benjamin Franklin and General Marquis de Lafayette to the modern era with Presidents Trump and Macron, U.S. and French leaders have long shared common values on a range of issues.

Today, the countries’ two leaders have forged a close bond. “Both President Macron and I understand our responsibility to prioritize the interests of our countries and, at the same time, to be respectful of the world in which we live,” President Trump said in Paris last year. “The friendship between our two nations—and ourselves, I might add—is unbreakable.”

The First Couples met last night before today’s official visit. President Trump, the First Lady, President Macron, and Mrs. Macron took a scenic tour of the monuments in our Nation’s capital. They then traveled to President George Washington’s home in Mount Vernon, Virginia, for dinner ahead of today’s welcome ceremony.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=b6dc8c0b6fdf3c9d63eea6c91a3446c863cd6d9ac4e9619aa1d1483b982a68c6d992c1285a44aa0a3dc80ddc9236317786025c4c768aa849
President Trump calls the U.S.-France bond “unbreakable.” History Shows He’s Right.

Behind the scenes:

What it means to host a State Visit at the White House

subject: I'm not accepting money from corporate PACs
body:
Dear Activist,

Yesterday morning **I announced I would no longer accept contributions from corporate PACs**. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why I am making this important decision.

Since taking office last year, I have witnessed firsthand the outsized influence of large corporations in our government.

**Citizens United has allowed them to spend virtually unlimited sums of money to influence our elections, tipping the balance of power in our democracy from voters to corporate PACs.**

That's why Republicans worked so quickly to pass legislation granting tax breaks to wealthy corporations at the direct expense of working people and seniors. Large corporations and their wealthy donors demanded it, so they did it.

[**I 'm Senator Kamala Harris and I'm asking for you to join my campaign and help me fight against corporate money in politics. Click here and sign up today to be a part of our people-powered campaign.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/dzJsD/6/Sv/r5cs/613Psl/ly0txyv4i/P/P) ****[Stand with Kamala](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/dzJsD/s/Sv/r5cs/613Psl/zuMO5xKWK6/P/P)**** As corporate PACs continue to corrupt our politics and twist Congress' priorities at your expense, we're going to focus on raising money from small-dollar, individual donors like you.

**Our average contribution over the previous year is just $18.32** \-- a number I am very proud of. That support has helped us raise millions for my colleagues and non-profit organizations assisting victims of natural disasters.

Working together I believe we have the power to address the real injustices that exist in America today. That begins by reforming our broken campaign finance system so that we can reset the agenda in Washington.

[**Join my campaign and help me fight against corporate money in politics. Click here and sign up today to be a part of our people-powered campaign.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/dzJsD/v/Sv/r5cs/613Psl/vDr8QTQZN4/P/P) ****[Stand with Kamala](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/dzJsD/z/Sv/r5cs/613Psl/vPT7PZi273/P/P)**** Thanks for everything you do,

Kamala Harris
U.S. Senator, California ****[Stand with Kamala](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/dzJsD/U/Sv/r5cs/613Psl/U3zBu5JebX/P/P)****
---

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMjYwLzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjA3OTMzNjM3)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: The Sanders Institute
subject: 6.1 million Americans without a right to vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
This year, Americans will choose the elected officials who will write and vote on laws
#
Friend,
This year, Americans will choose the elected officials who will write and vote on laws that will affect our country -- everything from stoplights to treason.
[**Over six million Americans, however, will not be able to vote for these politicians because of felony disenfranchisement.**](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7abf4/bed43eb/528f7a63/75fd8af3/4027917734/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/felon-disenfranchisement")
Ultimately, these men and women across the United States have little to no political recourse for challenging the laws that take away their ability to vote -- sometimes only while incarcerated, and sometimes for the rest of their lives.
For 6 weeks, the Sanders Institute and founding fellow Senator Nina Turner are looking at some of the glaring issues in our voting system. This week, we are addressing felon disenfranchisement.
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7abf4/bed43eb/528f7a63/75fd8af3/4027917734/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/felon-disenfranchisement")
Thanks for staying engaged,
The Sanders Institute Team

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: It is disgusting
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Friend, Just weeks after the sound of gunshots rang through the halls of their high school, the students of Marjory Stoneman Douglas began their mission for action. They marched on Tallahassee. They helped organize the March for Our Lives in Washington, D.C. They refuse to let spineless lawmakers, who bow to the gun lobby, get away with doing nothing. These young people are fearless, relentless, and truly inspiring. Republicans, of course, don't see it that way. Probably because they're the ones being called out for their failures. So, what's the response strategy from the far right? _Attack the victims._ Republican candidates and elected officials called Parkland students names and used outrageous slurs. Right-wing media personalities picked on students for everything from grades to college admissions. **It's absolutely disgusting.** It's one thing when extreme Republicans pick on people like me. I chose to run for this job. I chose to take on everything that comes with it. And I can handle attacks if it means standing up for what's right and getting things done. But these students didn't choose to get shot at. They didn't choose to see their friends die. But what they did choose is to take this tragedy and make something of it. They have the courage to fight for change. And today, we can all choose to stand beside them. [_**The students of Parkland won't back down because of right-wing bullies, and we can't either. Let's continue to build our grassroots movement in support of common-sense gun safety legislation. Add your name to mine.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ff8/622b7b5b/1a430751/307b8859/3287532097/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180420") I'm not only standing with Parkland students -- I'm taking action. The same prohibitions that bar an individual from buying a gun also prohibit ammunition purchases, but there is no verification. I have a plan to require the same background checks to buy a firearm for anyone buying ammunition. It will help to keep bullets out of the hands of those who shouldn't have them. And while no single law will stop every tragedy, this is exactly the kind of common-sense idea that could make a big difference. You can take action today too, team. [_**Stand with Parkland. Add your name to build our grassroots movement.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ff8/622b7b5b/1a430751/307b8859/3287532097/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180420") Thank you. Debbie
---

---

Peter,

Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) Administrator Scott Pruitt has failed middle-class families, voters, and taxpayers. His exorbitant spending on first-class flights around the country, his $43,000 soundproof phone booth for his office, and his backroom dealing with big industry lobbyists are deeply concerning and inappropriate for a cabinet member.

But compounding his extravagant spending is one fundamental truth: since taking this job, Scott Pruitt has done _nothing_ to protect our environment.

In fact, he has actively worked against climate science and key environmental protections, rolling back protections for clean air and water.

That's why 170 of my colleagues, including Republicans, are calling on Scott Pruitt to resign immediately from his position at the EPA.

**We want to hear your opinion.**

name: Ben Jealous
subject: An incredible week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friend,
We just finished up yet another incredible week of building a movement of working families to ensure that Maryland is a place where all of our loved ones can thrive.
**MSEA endorsement**
Last Tuesday, we were excited to officially announce the endorsement of the Maryland State Education Association. MSEA represents 74,000 educators in our great state, and our campaign received 85% of the vote from more than 300 delegates. Together with these educators, we can finally find the solutions our schools need to ensure every young person receives the education they deserve.
**Keynote speech at the National Cannabis Policy Summit**
On Friday, I gave the keynote speech at the National Cannabis Policy Summit. I spoke about growing up witnessing firsthand the effects of the war on drugs on my friends and family, and the importance of criminal justice reform.
My family is rooted in Baltimore, near the very place that Freddie Gray was murdered. Over-policing communities of color and filling our jails with non-violent offenders for minor drug infractions is a major problem.
As I developed my criminal justice reform policy, I knew it would have to include fully legalizing marijuana for adult use. In Baltimore alone, over 300 people were killed last year. If we don't regulate a legal market for marijuana, it will be regulated by bullets, catching innocent neighbors in the crossfire.
**My vision for fully funding our schools**
On Saturday afternoon, I met with individuals in Baltimore County to discuss how we'll ensure that every kid in Maryland gets the education they deserve. We discussed building a movement of working families and educators across our state to ensure that our schools are fully funded, our educators have the resources they need, and our kids are able to reach their full potential.
There are no shortage of solutions to our problems, friend, just a shortage of politicians with the courage to lead toward those solutions.
But really, we don't elect politicians to make these changes happen. We elect politicians to make it easier for the people to make change happen. That's the kind of governor I'll be. I am ready to listen and empower the people of this great state to get us back to doing big things. Join us.
Onward,
Ben Jealous

My vision for fully funding our schools On Saturday afternoon, I met with individuals in Baltimore County to discuss how we'll ensure that every kid in Maryland gets the education they deserve. We discussed building a movement of working families and educators across our state to ensure that our schools are fully funded, our educators have the resources they need, and our kids are able to reach their full potential. There are no shortage of solutions to our problems, friend, just a shortage of politicians with the courage to lead toward those solutions. But really, we don't elect politicians to make these changes happen. We elect politicians to make it easier for the people to make change happen. That's the kind of governor I'll be. I am ready to listen and empower the people of this great state to get us back to doing big things. Join us. Onward, Ben Jealous ** "" PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

subject: You haven't committed to vote yet, Derek

body:
You can help hit our ambitious goal of reaching 50 million voters by taking the first step right now.
---
Earlier this year, the DNC launched our IWillVote initiative -- an unprecedented effort to reach 50 million voters by November. Today I am counting on you to be a part of it.

Casting your vote this year will be crucial to helping shape the future of Virginia and our country.

**So far hundreds of thousands of people have committed to vote. Will you join them?**

**[ I WILL VOTE](https://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/IWillVote?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+I+WILL+VOTE&utm_campaign=em_20180424_abl_abldems&source=em_20180424_abl_abldems")
** The IWillVote campaign includes four steps:

1. Commit to vote
2. Voter registration
3. Voter education and protection
4. Get out the vote

We'll be organizing on the ground and online -- using the same strategies that helped Democrats win huge victories in places like Alabama and western Pennsylvania over the past few months.

Now it's time to organize in every state across the country -- and you can help our party hit our ambitious goal of reaching 50 million voters by taking the first step right now.

**[Add your name today to say you are committed to voting this fall.](https://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/IWillVote?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+today+to+say+you+are+commi&utm_campaign=em_20180424_abl_abldems&source=em_20180424_abl_abldems")**

Winning in November is going to take every single Democrat being involved. Thanks for being a part of this.

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political and Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

name: Donna Edwards
subject: Standing Up for Prince George's Teachers
body:
|
---
[ ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff1a/767134fb/5c92934f/43383c21/2371886502/VEsH/ "http://www.donnaforprincegeorges.org/")

| | Hello Friend, This week, I received the good news that I won the endorsement of the Prince George's County Educators' Association! This endorsement means so much to me because it means that our County's teachers believe in my vision to move our public schools forward. So many teachers show up to work every single day, passionate about preparing our children to achieve their dreams. It's time for someone to show up for them like they show up for our children. [**Can you share the news about my endorsement from PGCEA on Facebook and tell people why you are supporting my campaign for County Executive?**](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff1a/767134fb/5c92934f/43383c3e/2371886502/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/donnafernedwards/posts/2110836452276381") [](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff1a/767134fb/5c92934f/43383c3e/2371886502/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/donnafernedwards/posts/2110836452276381") I've called for Kevin Maxwell to be fired even before I announced my run for County Executive. I've pledged to ban political contributions by the CEO and administrative staff hoping peddle influence with elected officials and to fight to drive more dollars into our classrooms. Now is the time to restore accountability and transparency to our school system. As County Executive, I plan to hold the leadership of our schools accountable and put teachers and students first. **[Let your friends and family know that you support my vision for the Prince George's County Public Schools by sharing the news of my PGCEA endorsement. ](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff1a/767134fb/5c92934f/43383c3e/2371886502/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/donnafernedwards/posts/2110836452276381")** Thank you again for your support! Together, we can make the future of public education better in Prince George's County. Donna
